description_long: This is a rectangular, messenger-style grocery bag with a prominent red flap covering the front, featuring a subtle horizontal texture and a small rectangular logo patch on the lower right. The bag has a long, adjustable black shoulder strap attached at the sides, allowing it to be worn across the body. The main body of the bag is black, with the back side showing a handle for easy carrying and a small label near the top. The sides of the bag are black, with the red flap extending slightly over the edges. The bag appears to be made from a durable, water-resistant synthetic material, likely nylon or polyester, with reinforced stitching along the seams. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A rectangular, red-and-black messenger-style grocery bag with a long black shoulder strap, a red front flap, and a small logo patch. The bag is made from durable synthetic material and features a handle on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red flap with a subtle texture, black trim, and a small logo patch on the lower right.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the bag, the black side panel, and the attachment of the shoulder strap.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the black body, a handle near the top center, and a small label, with the red flap visible only at the top edge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black side panel and the strap attachment, with the red flap extending over the edge.
attribute_handle_type: long adjustable shoulder strap and a short back handle
attribute_branding_or_logo: Small rectangular logo patch on the lower right of the front flap
